title: Hypenia calycina
taxonomy: Hypenia calycina is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Hypenia, which is a part of the tribe Ocimeae. The classification of Hypenia calycina is further detailed within the subfamily Nepetoideae. Hypenia calycina is a member of the clade comprising the families Lamiaceae and Verbenaceae. The plant's classification is essential for understanding its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
